title: Netherite Shaped Armour
description: It's a resource pack that turn the original armour textures into the netherite texture one
body:
**migrated from cursforge**


this is a resource pack that turns the original armour textures into the netherite texture

![Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccbcecaee5baf49f061a35f71219862b593455af.png)


that's really all it does.
